Analyst Note: Upcoming Earnings Preview for Quantum Dynamics Ltd.

As we approach the Q3 earnings release scheduled for 15th November 2023, we maintain our positive outlook on Quantum Dynamics Ltd. (UEN: 202312345H). The company is expected to report robust growth driven by its expansion into the renewable energy sector. Our analysis anticipates a revenue increase of approximately 12% year-over-year, reaching an estimated SGD 78 million.

Dr. Amelia Tan, CEO of Quantum Dynamics, has consistently highlighted the strong demand for their innovative solar technologies. Investors should note the strategic partnerships announced last quarter, which are likely to contribute positively to the bottom line.

For further inquiries, please contact Mr. James Ong at +65 6123 4567 or via email at research@equityvision.sg. Please reference client code S2345678Z in your communications.

Equity Vision Research Team
